framework.name: Baker Botts 5-Layer Governance Model
framework.description: Scope/Identity/Monitoring/Override/Accountability layered framework. Treats agent deployment like onboarding an employee with signing authority. Completely human→agent; no layer addresses agent→agent delegation or authority attenuation.
framework.raw_quote: Organizations deploying AI agents may wish to treat agent deployment with the same rigor as onboarding an employee with signing authority.

source.title: When AI Agents Misbehave: Governance and Security for ... - Our Take
